name: roster-fast
_doc: Fast mode template: implement → review → qa → ship. KB/specs/friction-log updated if impacted.
_roster_note: Phase 1: not currently selectable — roster-plan (and plan.json) only exists in Full mode. Staged for future use when Fast mode gains a plan phase.

steps.prompt: Invoke the Skill tool with skill="roster-implement" and args="${TASK}". Pre-hook (run before Skill): TASK=${TASK} node .harness/bin/run-hook.js pre roster-implement. Post-hook (run after Skill): TASK=${TASK} node .harness/bin/run-hook.js post roster-implement.

Invoke the Skill tool with skill="roster-review" and args="${TASK}". Pre-hook (run before Skill): TASK=${TASK} node .harness/bin/run-hook.js pre roster-review. Post-hook (run after Skill): TASK=${TASK} node .harness/bin/run-hook.js post roster-review.

Invoke the Skill tool with skill="roster-qa" and args="${TASK}". Pre-hook (run before Skill): TASK=${TASK} node .harness/bin/run-hook.js pre roster-qa. Post-hook (run after Skill): TASK=${TASK} node .harness/bin/run-hook.js post roster-qa.

Invoke the Skill tool with skill="roster-ship" and args="${TASK}". Pre-hook (run before Skill): TASK=${TASK} node .harness/bin/run-hook.js pre roster-ship. Post-hook (run after Skill): TASK=${TASK} node .harness/bin/run-hook.js post roster-ship.
